results.rendered_html:
saṃdhita a.
1 United, joined;  Pt. 2. 35. 
2 Bound, tied.
3 Reconciled, allied.
4 Fixed, fitted.
5 Mixed together.
6 Pickled, preserved.
— taṃ
1 Pickles.
2 Spirituous liquor.
